/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/SnakeGame.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SnakeGame.dir/src/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SnakeGame.dir/src/controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SnakeGame.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SnakeGame.dir/src/snake_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SnakeGame.dir/src/player_snake.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SnakeGame.dir/src/ai_snake.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SnakeGame.dir/src/astar_pathfinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SnakeGame.dir/src/game_state.cpp.o -o SnakeGame  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so
